summary: Interactive full-width storage pie chart, two-column breakdown, and unmapped space guidance in Results.
introduced: Click pie chart slices to select a storage category; right-click for Show in Finder or Move to Trash
Unmapped used space banner explains gaps and offers Full Disk Access, Rescan, and Deep scan actions
Free Up Memory in the menu bar health popover and System Status header
changed: Results layout stacks a full-width pie chart above a two-column Storage Breakdown
Pie chart and breakdown rows highlight together on hover
